KeysToEntries.Misc_IndustrialSolvent_Description: Propylene glycol is a synthetic, colorless, odorless, viscous liquid commonly used as a solvent and humectant in various industries.
KeysToEntries.Misc_DrainCleaner_Description: Sodium hydroxide is a common ingredient in detergents and soaps. It is used in a variety of industrial and laboratory applications, such as dishwashing and neutralizing acids.
KeysToEntries.Misc_SulfuricAcid_Description: Sulfuric acid is the world's largest industrial chemical by volume. Its primary use is in the production of phosphate fertilizers. It is also used to make explosives, other acids, dyes, adhesives, wood preservatives, and automotive batteries.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Desinfection_Description: A chemical solution used to eliminate or reduce the presence of harmful microorganisms.
KeysToEntries.Misc_UNMedicalTools_Description: A box containing select surgical tools, pills, and materials. It is an emergency health pack provided to UN employees.
KeysToEntries.Misc_ThermalBlanket_Description: A lightweight sheet made from thin material that reflects body heat back towards the wearer. It helps retain body warmth and prevent hypothermia by minimizing heat loss in cold environments.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PackOfWaterCleaningTablets_Descript: These tablets treat water from potentially unsafe sources, such as streams or lakes, by removing or reducing the risk of waterborne diseases, thus making the water safe for consumption.
KeysToEntries.Misc_VialOfAntigens_Description: A small container holding a solution containing antigens, which are substances capable of stimulating an immune response in the body.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Toolset_Description: A toolset that holds a selection of handy tools for various purposes.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Multitool_Description: A compact and versatile hand tool that combines various functions into one portable device. Multitools often incorporate features such as pliers, screwdrivers, knives, saws, scissors, and more.
KeysToEntries.Misc_AcumulatorDrill_Description: A handheld power tool used for drilling holes and driving screws. It is battery-powered, providing mobility and flexibility compared to its corded counterparts.
KeysToEntries.Misc_RubberRenue_Description: Rubber renue is used to restore old rubber parts that have hardened and lost their grip and flexibility.
KeysToEntries.Misc_MotorOil_Description: Motor oil is a substance used to lubricate internal combustion engines.
KeysToEntries.Misc_BrakeFluid_Description: Brake fluid is a type of hydraulic fluid used in hydraulic brakes and hydraulic clutches in automobiles, motorcycles, light trucks, and some bicycles.
KeysToEntries.Misc_WhiteLithiumGrease_Description: White Lithium Grease is a corrosion-resistant lithium grease for metal-to-metal, metal-to-plastic, and plastic-to-plastic applications. It is primarily used to lubricate moving parts, such as those found in gears, hinges, latches, machinery, and various other types of equipment.
KeysToEntries.Misc_FuelCanister_Description: A container used for storing fuel, various liquids, and other chemical substances.
KeysToEntries.Misc_AcetyleneBottle8L_Description: A pressurized container designed to store and transport acetylene gas, a highly flammable and versatile fuel commonly used in welding and cutting applications.
KeysToEntries.Misc_WeaponOil_Description: A specialized lubricant designed to protect and maintain firearms.
KeysToEntries.Misc_LowGradeGunpowder_Description: A basic form of gunpowder. This low-grade mixture consists of charcoal, sulfur, and potassium nitrate. It is used as a propellant in firearms and other projectile-launching devices.
KeysToEntries.Misc_MilitaryCloth_Description: A specially designed textile featuring a pattern of colors and shapes that mimics the surrounding environment. It is used to conceal people or objects from view.
KeysToEntries.Misc_AramidCloth_Description: A strong, heat-resistant fabric woven from aramid fibers. It is known for its exceptional durability and flame-retardant properties.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Paracord_Description: A versatile and strong cordage made from nylon, the paracord originally gained prominence as parachute suspension lines.
KeysToEntries.Misc_CarBattery_Description: An essential component of a vehicle's electrical system, the car battery provides the necessary power to start the engine and operate various electrical components.
KeysToEntries.Misc_MotorbikeBattery_Description: A motorcycle battery is a crucial component that supplies the electrical power necessary to start the engine and operate essential components, including lights, gauges, and accessories.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Battery_Description: A convenient collection of AA-sized batteries, commonly used to power a wide range of electronic devices.
KeysToEntries.Misc_JumperCables_Description: An essential tool used for starting a vehicle with a dead or weak battery. Always remember: Red from the dead, to red on the good. Black from the good, to under the hood.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PhoneCharger_Description: A simple phone charger that helps keep the device operational.
KeysToEntries.Misc_SewingSet_Description: A small, handy set of tools and materials used for sewing and repairing fabrics.
KeysToEntries.Misc_FishingLine_Description: A durable fishing line. Even the biggest fish won't snap this one.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Lighter_Description: A lighter is a compact, handheld device designed for reliability and convenience. It produces a steady flame with a quick flick, making it useful for lighting candles, stoves, or cigarettes.
KeysToEntries.Misc_ZippoLighter_Description: A timeless, iconic accessory that combines style and functionality. This lighter has been a symbol of reliability and elegance for generations.
KeysToEntries.Misc_LampOil_Description: Lamp oil is a refined kerosene or paraffin oil formulated to burn cleanly in lamps, lanterns, and torches. It produces less smoke, soot, and odor than unrefined fuels and is widely used throughout Lamang.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PropaneBottle_Description: A bottle filled with highly flammable gas. This product was created by a renowned family-owned business that sells propane and propane accessories.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Bleach_Description: Bleach is a chemical solution, usually containing sodium hypochlorite, used to whiten or remove color from materials and to disinfect them by killing viruses and bacteria. WARNING: Bleach is not a panacea!
KeysToEntries.Misc_Vaseline_Description: Petrolatum, also known as petroleum jelly or vaseline, is a semi-solid, greasy mixture of hydrocarbons derived from petroleum. It effectively acts as an occlusive agent, forming a protective layer on the skin that prevents moisture loss and encourages healing.
KeysToEntries.Misc_CleaningProduct_Description: A bottle of detergent for keeping everything sparkly clean.
KeysToEntries.Misc_InsectRepeletnSpray_Description: An insect repellant spray is a substance that is applied to the skin, clothing, or other surfaces to deter insects from landing or climbing on them. Don't go into the jungle without one!
KeysToEntries.Misc_PackOfPremiumCoffee_Description: Imagine coffee plantations nestled in a mountainous region where mist shrouds the slopes and volcanic soil imparts a unique character to the beans. This exceptional coffee combines elegance and delicacy with a complex flavor profile, resulting in an intense aroma and natural sweetness.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PerfumeBottleFragrant_Description: Created from the finest patchouli and clove plants that Indonesia has to offer, along with orange essence from Brazil. This powerful perfume blends the best of the East and West into a unique aromatic experience.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PerfumeBottleDelicate_Description: Let the golden warmth of the Brazilian sun envelop you. This delicate perfume opens with the enticing scents of pistachio and almond, followed by the smooth aromas of heliotrope and jasmine petals. It concludes with vanilla, intoxicating salted caramel, and warm sandalwood.
KeysToEntries.Misc_DeckOfCards_Description: A classic set of playing cards, comprising 52 cards divided into four suits.
KeysToEntries.Misc_HandMirror_Description: A lovely vintage hand mirror. WARNING: Don't break it out of shock when you look into it! Despite everything, it's still you.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Cigarretes_Description: Crafted with unparalleled precision, the Tahirs brand embodies a tradition of excellence and resolve that resonates through every puff. WARNING: Smoking Tahirs can cause a slow and painful death.
KeysToEntries.Misc_CartonOfCiggaretes_Description: Crafted with unparalleled precision, the Tahirs brand embodies a tradition of excellence and resolve that resonates through every puff. Think big, just like our glorious leader, and get an entire carton! WARNING: Smoking Tahirs can cause a slow and painful death.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Grinder_01a_Description: An angle grinder is a power tool used for grinding and polishing.
KeysToEntries.Misc_IronHammer_A01_N1_Description: A carpentry hammer is a hand tool primarily used for driving nails into or pulling them out of wood. It is also a favorite instrument of torturers.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Wrench_E01_N1_Description: A hand tool used to turn bolts, nuts, and other fasteners by applying torque.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Nailgun_01a_Description: A nailgun is a power tool used to drive nails into materials like wood, using predominantly compressed air. WARNING: Don't scratch your head with this device!
KeysToEntries.Misc_Screwdriver_01b_Description: A hand tool designed for turning screws and fasteners. It consists of a handle and a shaft with a tip that matches the type of the screw's head.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Jigsaw_01b_Description: A jigsaw is a saw that uses a reciprocating blade to cut irregular curves, such as stenciled designs, in wood, metal, or other materials.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Saw_01b_Description: A hand tool that is used for shaping lumber or, if times are desperate enough, amputation.
KeysToEntries.Misc_HyperboreaCigarettes_Description: Noir Mist is tradition. Noir Mist is luxury. Velvet-smooth and rich in flavor, made primarily from Turkish tobacco. The aftertaste? Orgasmic. Once you light one, you won’t want to put it down.
KeysToEntries.Misc_Cigars_Description: The Lambert is a meticulously curated work of art that showcases the finest traditional cigar-making techniques combined with modern innovations. With its distinct design, there can be only one.
KeysToEntries.Misc_PerfumeBottleOutlandish_Description: Vibrant and bold, this unrivaled perfume is rich in aromas that will delight anyone who values only the best. Don't miss this exquisite fragrance, featuring tropical notes of freshly picked fruits, a floral heart, and a sophisticated finish.
KeysToEntries.Misc_IDCardLocal_Description: A lost ID card of a Lamangese citizen.
KeysToEntries.Misc_DriversLicence_Description: A lost driver's license. Not having it on you when driving can cause problems with the police.
KeysToEntries.Misc_IDCardBusinessman_Description: A lost ID card belonging to a wealthy businessperson. It would be bad if it fell into the wrong hands.
KeysToEntries.Misc_TouristPassport_Description: A lost passport belonging to a tourist. It doesn't seem like the person had a good time in Lamang.
KeysToEntries.Misc_VIPPassport_Description: A lost VIP passport belonging to a wealthy tourist. So much for the promised heaven on earth in Lamang.
